overall_assessment.fls_score_context: This 506.7 score represents solid intermediate performance, placing you in the competent range with room for refinement in precision.
overall_assessment.session_headline: Strong technical execution visible in early phases, though video quality issues limited full assessment of your complete performance.

rubric_insights.observation: 3.3mm total deviation from marks resulted in 3.3 penalty points - this is actually quite good precision for intermediate level
rubric_insights.impact_on_score: Lost 3.3 points from placement penalties, but this is within acceptable range for skill development

rubric_insights.observation: 90-second completion time is efficient and shows good pacing through all phases
rubric_insights.impact_on_score: Strong time performance contributed positively to overall score

rubric_insights.observation: Proper surgeon's knot sequence with alternating hands demonstrates good technical knowledge
rubric_insights.impact_on_score: No knot penalties - secure knots maintained scoring potential

technique_coaching.observation: In frame 3, needle holder approach to suture shows steady control and appropriate grasp positioning
technique_coaching.why_it_matters: Consistent needle control reduces tissue trauma and improves placement accuracy
technique_coaching.correction: Continue this steady approach - your needle handling appears well-controlled in visible segments
technique_coaching.drill: Practice 20 needle loads focusing on consistent 2/3 grasp point before each session

technique_coaching.observation: Frames 4-5 show clean needle passage through drain with good trajectory toward second mark
technique_coaching.why_it_matters: Smooth needle passage minimizes tissue damage and maintains suture integrity
technique_coaching.correction: Your placement technique looks solid - focus on maintaining this smooth motion while improving mark precision
technique_coaching.drill: Practice 15 placement attempts on marked targets, measuring deviation after each attempt

technique_coaching.observation: Frame 9 shows good bimanual coordination with both instruments working efficiently
technique_coaching.why_it_matters: Smooth instrument coordination reduces procedure time and maintains tissue control
technique_coaching.correction: Maintain this level of coordination throughout the entire procedure
technique_coaching.drill: Practice instrument exchanges during knot tying - 10 complete sequences focusing on smooth handoffs

strengths_to_reinforce.observation: Frame 4 shows excellent needle placement accuracy through the first mark with clean entry angle
strengths_to_reinforce.why_it_matters: Precise placement is the foundation of surgical suturing and you're demonstrating good control
strengths_to_reinforce.encouragement: Your placement technique shows real skill development - this level of accuracy will serve you well as you progress

strengths_to_reinforce.observation: Frame 9 demonstrates strong bimanual coordination with both instruments working in harmony
strengths_to_reinforce.why_it_matters: Coordinated instrument use is a hallmark of advanced laparoscopic skill
strengths_to_reinforce.encouragement: This level of coordination indicates you're developing the muscle memory essential for expert performance

practice_plan.session_focus: Improving suture placement precision while maintaining your current speed and coordination
practice_plan.warmup_drill: 5 minutes of needle loading practice focusing on consistent 2/3 grasp point

primary_drill.name: Precision Placement Challenge
primary_drill.description: Mark 10 target points on practice material. Attempt suture placement through each mark, measuring deviation. Record your accuracy and aim to reduce average deviation by 0.5mm
primary_drill.success_criteria: Average deviation under 2mm across all 10 attempts

practice_plan.cooldown: Review your most accurate placement - what felt different about your approach on that attempt?
practice_plan.estimated_sessions_to_improvement: 3-4 focused sessions should bring your placement precision into expert range

progress_context.vs_baseline: Significant improvement from early 415.5 score - you've gained nearly 100 points
progress_context.vs_peak: Close to your peak performance range of 550+ - consistency is developing well
progress_context.milestone_note: Next target: Sub-85 seconds with under 2mm total deviation for expert-level performance

coaching_limitations: Extensive black screen periods (frames 11-22) prevented assessment of knot tying technique and cutting phase. Unable to evaluate needle angle consistency, loop formation quality, or cutting precision due to video quality issues.
